image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Ever wondered why your body shuts down during dreams?
Context visual: It's called REM atonia; your brain inhibits most muscles.
Escalation visual: This protective mechanism prevents you from acting out dreams.
Evidence visual: However, misfires can lead to sleep paralysis, an eerie experience.
Payoff visual: Preliminary research suggests this might be a brain glitch.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into sleep science? Hit like and subscribe!
